geography: Metro Manila / NCR first, Philippines-capable sources where noted

ecc_boundaries.security: no credentials, auth bypass, hidden endpoint scraping, or third-party writes
ecc_boundaries.attribution: every source row carries a source_url
ecc_boundaries.workflow_surface: skills/address-disaster-risk-assessor is the reusable workflow entrypoint

sources.name: MGBPublic Flood MapServer
sources.coverage: Philippines, with Metro Manila filtering by bbox or point geometry
sources.rate_limits: not published; use polite bounded queries and local caching
sources.last_updated_signal: live count check returned 87968 features on 2026-07-03; agent observed 2025 edit timestamps in layer fields
sources.metro_manila_filter_method: geocoded point query or NCR bounding box; store returned susceptibility class and geometry relationship
sources.license_or_terms: public service but redistribution license unclear; cite DENR-MGB/GeoRiskPH and verify before redistribution
sources.risks: Layer classes and vintage need field-level normalization; not a site-specific engineering assessment.

sources.name: PHIVOLCSPublic Liquefaction MapServer
sources.rate_limits: not published; use bounded point queries and cache results
sources.last_updated_signal: live count check returned 239 features on 2026-07-03; service metadata includes PHIVOLCS acknowledgement as of July 2018 and publishdate fields
sources.metro_manila_filter_method: point-in-polygon query against geocoded lon/lat
sources.license_or_terms: acknowledge PHIVOLCS; verify redistribution terms before storing derived map products
sources.risks: Class codes require domain mapping; not a geotechnical report.

sources.name: PHIVOLCSPublic ActiveFault MapServer
sources.coverage: Philippines, includes Valley Fault System and Metro Manila
sources.rate_limits: not published; use NCR bbox downloads sparingly and calculate distance locally
sources.last_updated_signal: live count check returned 6582 features on 2026-07-03; layer has datemapped fields
sources.metro_manila_filter_method: query NCR bbox and compute nearest-line distance to address locally
sources.license_or_terms: PHIVOLCS attribution required; verify reuse terms
sources.risks: Server-side nearest search may be inconsistent; do not rely on it for distance scoring.

sources.name: MMDA Flood-Prone Areas FeatureServer
sources.rate_limits: ArcGIS Online public service limits apply; use city filters and cache
sources.last_updated_signal: live count check returned 593 features on 2026-07-03; agent found 2016-2024 snippet and June 2025 edit signal
sources.metro_manila_filter_method: nearest point within buffer and city filter via CityMunic
sources.license_or_terms: ArcGIS item license blank; cite MMDA and avoid redistribution claims
sources.risks: Point records are not flood polygons; depth fields require sanity checks.

sources.name: MMDA River Line FeatureServer
sources.rate_limits: ArcGIS Online public service limits apply; cache city extracts
sources.last_updated_signal: live count check returned 6908 features on 2026-07-03; ArcGIS item modified June 2025 per agent check
sources.metro_manila_filter_method: compute nearest-line distance from address; combine with flood-prone points
sources.license_or_terms: ArcGIS item license not stated; cite MMDA
sources.risks: River proximity is not proof of flooding or poor drainage.

sources.name: Project NOAH Hazard Maps on BetterGov
sources.owner: DOST / Project NOAH, repackaged by BetterGovPH
sources.access_method: BetterGov API metadata and Hugging Face PMTiles download
sources.rate_limits: large 5.55 GB resource; download intentionally and cache locally
sources.last_updated_signal: BetterGov latest_version_date 2026-04-11; resource id 416 checked on 2026-07-03
sources.metro_manila_filter_method: inspect PMTiles layer schema, clip/read tiles for NCR or address tile, then point-in-polygon where geometry can be reconstructed
sources.license_or_terms: ODC-ODbL with Project NOAH/DOST attribution per BetterGov metadata
sources.risks: Large package and tile schema must be inspected before parcel scoring; attribution/share-alike obligations apply.

sources.name: MGBPublic RainInducedLandslide MapServer
sources.coverage: Philippines; lower relevance for most Metro Manila addresses but useful for edge cases
sources.rate_limits: not published; use bounded point or bbox queries
sources.last_updated_signal: agent observed source hazard vintage around 2012
sources.metro_manila_filter_method: point-in-polygon query; if no hit, report not applicable or unknown based on coverage
sources.license_or_terms: public service but redistribution license unclear; cite DENR-MGB/GeoRiskPH
sources.risks: Older layer; many NCR addresses may have no meaningful landslide exposure.

sources.name: HDX Philippines Subnational Administrative Boundaries
sources.owner: OCHA FIS / HDX, sourced from NAMRIA and PSA
sources.rate_limits: HDX public API norms; large downloads should be cached
sources.last_updated_signal: metadata_modified 2026-06-24; last_modified 2026-05-28
sources.metro_manila_filter_method: filter admin1 p-code PH13 / NCR, then city and barangay spatial join
sources.license_or_terms: CC BY-IGO
sources.risks: Boundary definitions can differ from LGU datasets; use as humanitarian/admin join layer, not legal boundary proof.

sources.name: OpenStreetMap Philippines via Geofabrik
sources.rate_limits: download mirror etiquette applies; cache extracts
sources.last_updated_signal: agent observed extract current to 2026-07-03T04:51:13Z
sources.metro_manila_filter_method: clip PBF/GPKG to NCR boundary and query waterways, roads, hospitals, schools, evacuation-adjacent POIs, waste tags
sources.sample_query: osmium tags-filter philippines.osm.pbf n/w/waterway n/amenity=waste_disposal -o ncr-water-waste.osm.pbf
market_research_use_cases: weak service proxy when tags exist
sources.license_or_terms: ODbL attribution and share-alike obligations
sources.risks: Volunteer mapping bias; absence of tags is not absence of risk.

sources.name: PAGASA Pasig-Marikina-Tullahan Flood Forecasting and Warning System
sources.coverage: Pasig, Marikina, and Tullahan basin stations
sources.data_type: operational water-level map and JSON-like endpoint
sources.access_method: public map plus internal AJAX endpoint observed by agent
sources.rate_limits: not published; treat as operational public service and poll conservatively
sources.last_updated_signal: agent observed page timestamp 2026-07-03 19:20
sources.metro_manila_filter_method: associate address to nearest basin/station where relevant; do not infer long-term hazard from live level alone
sources.license_or_terms: PAGASA copyright shown on site
sources.risks: Operational endpoint may change; not a historical archive or parcel flood probability layer.

sources.name: PHIVOLCSPublic GroundShaking MapServer
sources.rate_limits: not published; validate point identify before production
sources.last_updated_signal: agent observed identify response with created/edited date 2024-08-07
sources.metro_manila_filter_method: identify at geocoded point with small map extent
sources.license_or_terms: DOST-PHIVOLCS; verify reuse terms
sources.risks: Identify is more brittle than clean feature query; use as supplemental after more point validation.

sources.name: PHIVOLCSPublic Tsunami MapServer
sources.coverage: Philippines coastal areas; relevant for coastal Metro Manila addresses only
sources.access_method: ArcGIS REST MapServer candidate query or identify
sources.rate_limits: not published
sources.last_updated_signal: metadata sparse in agent check
sources.metro_manila_filter_method: only run for coastal NCR addresses; point-in-polygon or identify
sources.sample_query: Use ArcGIS identify with geocoded lon/lat and a local mapExtent; validate each coastal sample.
sources.license_or_terms: PHIVOLCS attribution; verify reuse terms
sources.risks: Inland no-hit is not a complete tsunami safety proof; coverage must be confirmed.

sources.name: LiPAD FMC / UP DREAM Phil-LiDAR Flood Hazard Maps
sources.coverage: Philippines local flood hazard map layers, with Metro Manila layer candidates
sources.rate_limits: not published; WFS queries should be bounded
sources.last_updated_signal: agent observed Metro Manila sample around 2017; layer-specific vintage required
sources.metro_manila_filter_method: discover relevant NCR typeName, then point query or bounded GetFeature
sources.license_or_terms: license unclear on observed layers; verify before redistribution
sources.risks: Layer discovery and naming require care; older vintage and unclear terms.

sources.name: HDX Philippines GeoHazards Data
sources.access_method: HDX CKAN package metadata and KMZ download
sources.rate_limits: HDX public API norms
sources.last_updated_signal: agent observed CKAN metadata_modified 2026-06-23 but resource vintage around 2019
sources.metro_manila_filter_method: download KMZ, convert to GeoJSON, clip to NCR, compute nearest fault locally
market_research_use_cases: offline fallback if ArcGIS service changes
sources.license_or_terms: HDX license field returned Other in agent check; verify before redistribution
sources.risks: Staler and less direct than PHIVOLCS ArcGIS service.

sources.name: Flood Control Projects Dashboard data
sources.owner: BetterGov.PH, attributed to Sumbong sa Pangulo
sources.rate_limits: BetterGov public API norms
sources.last_updated_signal: search returned dataset id 2 with latest_version_date 2025-09-21 and CC0 license
sources.metro_manila_filter_method: filter to NCR projects and radius-match project coordinates when available
sources.license_or_terms: CC0 1.0 Universal per BetterGov metadata
sources.risks: Project presence is not proof of flood safety or service quality.

sources.name: HazardHunterPH / GeoRiskPH
sources.owner: GeoRisk Philippines led by DOST-PHIVOLCS with partner agencies
sources.access_method: public web app for basic search; advanced features account-gated
sources.auth_required: no for basic use; yes for advanced partner features
sources.rate_limits: not applicable for manual use
sources.last_updated_signal: site live in 2026; hazards may be updated as new data become available per agent checks
sources.metro_manila_filter_method: manual address or coordinate lookup as official cross-check
sources.sample_query: Use the public map UI with the normalized address or coordinates.
sources.license_or_terms: site copyright and terms restrict copying/redistribution; do not automate gated features
sources.risks: Manual-first; not a documented bulk API. Treat report as screening context, not certification.

sources.name: PHIVOLCS FaultFinder
sources.coverage: Philippines, useful for Valley Fault System and Greater Metro Manila
sources.access_method: manual app lookup; backend services not a documented public bulk API
sources.rate_limits: not applicable for manual use
sources.last_updated_signal: agent observed Google Play listing updated 2025-08-13
sources.metro_manila_filter_method: enter address or coordinates and record nearest active fault distance; automate via PHIVOLCS ActiveFault layer instead
sources.sample_query: Use app UI for official manual cross-check.
sources.license_or_terms: PHIVOLCS/app terms; verify redistribution
sources.risks: Not a documented API; do not scrape app internals.

sources.name: MMDA Metro Manila GIS Hub
sources.access_method: ArcGIS Hub and ArcGIS Online org search
sources.rate_limits: ArcGIS Hub/Online public service norms
sources.last_updated_signal: agent observed hub item modified 2025-02-13; prior repo validation found ArcGIS owner search with 27 Feature Services
sources.metro_manila_filter_method: use catalog discovery, then query specific FeatureServer layers
sources.license_or_terms: per-layer license often blank; cite MMDA
sources.risks: Hub dataset collection may return empty; specific ArcGIS item endpoints are more reliable.

sources.name: Metro Manila Flood Management Project documents
sources.coverage: Selected Metro Manila drainage areas and pumping stations
sources.rate_limits: not applicable for manual use
sources.last_updated_signal: agent found World Bank/AIIB project materials updated through 2025, project closing target 2026-11-30 in World Bank docs
sources.metro_manila_filter_method: manual match named pumping station or drainage area to nearby address context
sources.sample_query: Download project PDF and extract named pumping stations/drainage areas for manual cross-reference.
sources.license_or_terms: AIIB page footer uses CC BY-NC-ND 3.0 IGO; World Bank documents have their own terms
sources.risks: Not clean GIS; project presence is not proof of local service quality.

sources.name: Metro Manila LGU DRRMO and CDRA pages
sources.coverage: City-specific; examples include Quezon City, Pasig, Taguig, Valenzuela
sources.access_method: manual official-page review or document request
sources.auth_required: no for pages; requests may require process steps
sources.rate_limits: not applicable for manual review
sources.last_updated_signal: agent found current public pages and 2023 QC CDRA upload
sources.metro_manila_filter_method: city/barangay match after address normalization; extract only cited official statements
sources.sample_query: Manual city-specific lookup after identifying address LGU.
sources.license_or_terms: city site terms vary; no uniform open data license
sources.risks: Mostly not machine-readable and often not address-level.

sources.name: LGU waste collection and sanitation service pages
sources.coverage: City-specific; examples include Quezon City and Pasig
sources.rate_limits: not applicable for manual review
sources.last_updated_signal: agent observed current service pages; no reliable incident history
sources.metro_manila_filter_method: address to city/barangay, then record schedule availability only
sources.sample_query: Manual city-specific lookup; do not infer service quality from schedule alone.
sources.license_or_terms: city site terms vary; no uniform open data license
sources.risks: Schedule existence is not collection reliability; do not score 'bad waste management' without complaint/performance data.

sources.name: MMDA FOI flood incident and waste-management requests
sources.coverage: Metro Manila if request is fulfilled
sources.data_type: FOI request precedent; not public file download
sources.access_method: manual FOI request or monitor public request pages
sources.rate_limits: not applicable
sources.last_updated_signal: agent observed a 2026 successful request with response sent by email and a separate June 30, 2026 pending historical flood request
sources.metro_manila_filter_method: if obtained, join by city/barangay/road/date/severity
sources.sample_query: File or monitor FOI request; do not assume data is public until released.
sources.license_or_terms: FOI public-domain default unless otherwise stated, but response terms must be checked
sources.risks: No public downloadable dataset yet; privacy redaction and reuse restrictions may apply.

sources.name: USGS Earthquake Catalog API
sources.rate_limits: USGS public service norms
sources.last_updated_signal: live API metadata generated at request time
sources.metro_manila_filter_method: bbox or radius around address for supplemental event context
sources.license_or_terms: USGS/DOI terms; cite USGS
sources.risks: Supplemental only; not a replacement for PHIVOLCS hazard layers or local intensity data.
